item.description: NBC News projects that Democratic Los Angeles City Council member Nithya Raman will advance to a runoff with Mayor Karen Bass in the general election.

media:content.media:title: Nithya Raman to advance in L.A. mayoral runoff race, NBC News projects
media:content.media:description: NBC News projects that Democratic Los Angeles City Council member Nithya Raman will advance to a runoff with Mayor Karen Bass in the general election.

item.title: Nithya Raman to advance in L.A. mayoral runoff race, NBC News projects

item.dc:creator: Jamie Knodel
Chelsea Stahl
item.description: Forget the sky. Plenty of bold-faced names are expected Monday night on Celebrity Row and throughout the crowd at Game 3 of the NBA Finals.

media:content.media:text: Celebrities and President Donald Trump attend game three of the NBA Finals in New York.
Timothée Chalamet
DJ Khaled and Fat Joe sit courtside.
Cardi B and NEw York Knicks dancers on the court.
Cardi B performs during halftime during Game Three
Spike Lee and Dave Chappelle
Celebrities sit courtside.
Larry David
President Trump reacts to the crowd
Ben Stiller kneels on the court to take photos.
Tracy Morgan riles the crowd courtside.
Chris Rock attends the game between the San Antonio Spurs against the New York Knicks.
Jay-Z and John Stewart at Madison Square Garden.
Timothee Chalamet cheers courtside.
Jeremy Lin and Spike Lee hold up peace signs.

item.title: Plenty of star power on celebrity row for Knicks-Spurs Game 3

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Raquel Coronell Uribe
Sarah Dean
item.description: President Donald Trump attended Madison Square Garden for Game 3 of the NBA Finals on Monday to cheer on his hometown team — but many of his fellow fans didn’t appear thrilled to have him there.

media:content.media:text: U.S. President Donald Trump at Madison Square Garden
media:content.media:description: U.S. President Donald Trump listens to the national anthem before the start of game 3 of the NBA Finals between New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs at Madison Square Garden on June 8, 2026 in New York.

item.title: Trump booed at Madison Square Garden for Game 3 of NBA Finals

item.description: Iran and Israel exchanged strikes for the first time since the April ceasefire as tensions rise once again in the Middle East. After Iran’s attack, President Donald Trump said he would ask Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu "not to retaliate" and that he will have to accept any deal the U.S. negotiates with Iran, saying, “He won’t have any choice…I call all the shots.” NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Trump Tells Israel Not to Strike Iran, Saying He 'Calls the Shots'
media:content.media:description: Iran and Israel exchanged strikes for the first time since the April ceasefire as tensions rise once again in the Middle East. After Iran’s attack, President Donald Trump said he would ask Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu "not to retaliate" and that he will have to accept any deal the U.S. negotiates with Iran, saying, “He won’t have any choice…I call all the shots.” NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

item.title: Trump Tells Israel Not to Strike Iran, Saying He 'Calls the Shots'

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: OpenAI announced it has filed to offer its stock on public markets, just a week after its chief rival, Anthropic, did the same.

media:content.media:text: Open AI CEO Speaks At Annual Snowflake Summit In San Francisco
media:content.media:description: Open AI CEO Sam Altman speaks during Snowflake Summit 2025 at Moscone Center on June 02, 2025 in San Francisco, California. Snowflake Summit 2025 runs through June 5th.

item.title: OpenAI files for IPO as AI investment race intensifies

item.dc:creator: Jared Perlo
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren had invited Huang to discuss Nvidia’s business in China at a Senate committee meeting about America’s AI industry.

media:content.media:text: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass.,
media:content.media:description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., at a committee hearing on Capitol Hill on April 30.

media:content.media:text: Nvidia founder and CEO Jensen Huang
media:content.media:description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., at a committee hearing on Capitol Hill on April 30.

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang declines Warren’s request to testify at AI hearing

item.dc:creator: David Ingram
item.description: The overhaul puts Siri into more direct competition with modern AI assistants such as ChatGPT.

media:content.media:text: Key Speakers At The Apple WWDC
media:content.media:description: Apple CEO Tim Cook during the Worldwide Developers Conference at Apple Park campus in Cupertino, Calif., on Monday.

media:content.media:text: At WWDC26, Apple unveiled the next generation of Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, powerful parental controls, and an expansive set of software improvements across iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, visionOS, and tvOS.
media:content.media:description: Apple CEO Tim Cook during the Worldwide Developers Conference at Apple Park campus in Cupertino, Calif., on Monday.

item.title: Apple renames Siri as ‘Siri AI’ with new push into artificial intelligence

item.dc:creator: Samantha Elkins
item.description: Brad Paisley urged his followers to sign a petition to stop the construction of a 69,000-square-foot data center that would be 50 yards from the zoo.

media:content.media:text: World Series - Toronto Blue Jays v Los Angeles Dodgers - Game Three
media:content.media:description: Brad Paisley performs before Game 3 of the World Series at Dodger Stadium in Los Angeles on Oct. 27.

item.title: Brad Paisley criticizes data center planned next to Nashville Zoo

item.dc:creator: Scott Wong
Julie Tsirkin
Brennan Leach
item.description: Democrats and some Republicans were critical of the president’s defense of his “anti-weaponization” fund on NBC News’ “Meet the Press.” Others believe the idea is dead.

media:content.media:text: Protests As Joint Session Of Congress Confirms Presidential Election Result
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump has not ruled out giving taxpayer funds to rioters who fought against police officers on Jan. 6, 2021.

item.title: Some Republicans say Trump should close the door on paying out Jan. 6 rioters

item.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

media:content.media:title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
media:content.media:description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

item.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
Tara Prindiville
item.description: The Justice Department opened a separate investigation this year into the Democratic governor over allegations he helped impede immigration enforcement.

media:content.media:text: Vice President JD Vance
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance leads the White House Task Force to Eliminate Fraud.

item.title: Vance refers Gov. Tim Walz and Minnesota attorney general to DOJ for fraud investigation

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
item.description: A man wanted on suspicion of driving recklessly was attacked by an alligator but continued running from police before he was finally arrested, Louisiana authorities said Monday

media:content.media:text: An alligator is seen in a pond
media:content.media:description: An alligator in Avondale, La.

item.title: Man fleeing police attacked by alligator before continuing his getaway, Louisiana authorities say

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
Scott Bland
item.description: Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass will face City Council member Nithya Raman in a runoff election for Bass’ job in November, NBC News projects, teeing up a one-on-one matchup between two Democrats

media:content.media:credit: AFP via Getty Images; Getty Images
media:content.media:text: Nithya Ramanand Mayor Karen Bass
media:content.media:description: Nithya Ramanand Mayor Karen Bass

item.title: Nithya Raman advances over Spencer Pratt to face L.A. Mayor Karen Bass in a runoff

item.dc:creator: Matt Dixon
Peter Nicholas
item.description: MAGA Inc., top Trump-backed super PAC, is set to hold a $1 million-per-person fundraiser the day before the UFC matches on the White House grounds.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump speaks to reporters
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump speaks to reporters after landing on June 5, 2026 in Chippewa County, Wis.

media:content.media:text: Construction Continues Around D.C. As The Nation's Capital Prepares For America's 250th Events
media:content.media:description: Preparations continue Monday for the Ultimate Fighting Championship event on the White House South Lawn.

item.title: Trump-backed super PAC to host a $1M-per-person fundraiser the day before the White House UFC fight

item.dc:creator: Suzanne Gamboa
Maria Guerrero, NBC Dallas-Fort Worth
Meredith Yeomans, NBC Dallas-Fort Worth
item.description: Closing arguments are expected to start Tuesday as jurors were ordered sequestered in their hotel and instructed to stay off social media.

media:content.media:text: Karmelo Anthony leaves jail on April 14, 2025.
media:content.media:description: Karmelo Anthony leaves jail on April 14, 2025.

media:content.media:text: Austin Metcalf.
media:content.media:description: Karmelo Anthony leaves jail on April 14, 2025.

media:content.media:text: Police in Frisco, Texas have charged a 17-year-old student with murder after he fatally stabbed another 17-year-old student
media:content.media:description: Karmelo Anthony leaves jail on April 14, 2025.

item.title: Defense rests in Karmelo Anthony murder trial after days of emotional testimony

item.dc:creator: Dan De Luce
Gordon Lubold
Courtney Kube
item.description: David Rush is under investigation on suspicion of creating a fake spy program and persuading others to take part. The CIA transferred large amounts of money to the sham project, sources say.

media:content.media:text: Former CIA Officer David Rush appears in court on June 5, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Former CIA officer David Rush appears in court Friday.

item.title: CIA officer arrested with gold bars accused of making up top secret program, sources say

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
item.description: James “Weston” Higginbotham’s body was found in a mountainous area outside of Kyoto after he’d been missing for about a week.

media:content.media:text: James Higginbotham smiles outside
media:content.media:description: James "Weston" Higginbotham.

item.title: Auburn student whose body was found after he went missing in Japan was on a ‘decompression’ hike

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail

media:content.media:text: Graham Platner
media:content.media:description: Graham Platner acknowledges applause at a campaign event in Bar Harbor, Maine, on Friday.

item.title: How Maine’s Senate race looks similar to another recent major election: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: An executive jet headed to Texas to pick up a former MLB star burst into flames Sunday during a rough landing, killing both pilots.

media:content.media:credit: Houston Astros via Getty Images file
media:content.media:text: 2026 World Baseball Classic - Quarterfinals - Puerto Rico v Italy
media:content.media:description: Yadier Molina #4 of Puerto Rico in the 2026 World Baseball Classic Quarterfinals game on March 14, 2026 in Houston, Texas.

item.title: Two pilots killed in plane crash en route to pick up former MLB star
